posts.author: dchobanoff (Dave Chobanoff)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, if there is something i cannot find it, i am a total newb with the site, but currently our organizations workflow is Google Docs, i would like to utilize Monday.com, but i do not want to recreate wheel either. So we have a form for people to nominate, via our website, but its through WPForms, and then that spits out a Google Sheet, ideally id love for that form to be able to link into Monday, but id be good with having the google sheet in and being able to use the live sheet info to create boards and etc. is this a thing?
